data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Implementation of efficient content chunks aligns with cognitive processing limits.
data.technical_spec: Maximum of 7±2 elements per content section to facilitate better information digestion.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Clickable targets are large and strategically positioned for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and spacing optimized for touchscreen usability.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes cognitive load by reducing the complexity of user choices.
data.technical_spec: Simple navigation structures with no more than 3 primary options at first glance.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent theme with Adobe's signature color palette and use of high-quality visuals.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design reflects user expectations based on similar platforms for intuitive interaction.
data.technical_spec: Integrates familiar navigation patterns from popular design software.
